title: Edit Heat Pump Community Story
brief: I have a mix of iPhone and GoPro clips capturing an Australian household’s receiving a free heat-pump hot-water system. The aim is purely informational/ promotional : by the end of the piece viewers should understand how the family were let down by another company and Viessman stepped in and provided the unit for free, Heat Pump Central installed the unit (good news story) I need a polished, professional cut that runs comfortably under two minutes. Expect a straight-forward narrative flow—light, purposeful pacing, clean lower-thirds for names or key facts, tight colour correction to match the two cameras, and smooth audio levelling throughout. I can supply any extra b-roll, stills, or manufacturer graphics you think would enhance clarity; just flag what you need once you review the raw files. Please deliver: • One 16:9 master file ready for YouTube and social media upload (H.264, 1080p or higher) • A matching caption (.srt) file so the video is fully accessible If you prefer to work in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve, that’s fine—just hand over the final export plus the project file so I can archive it. Let me know your expected turnaround as well as any questions about the footage, and we can get started right away.
